description.en: The maximum window size, expressed as a power of 2. For example, if MAX_WBITS is 15 it results in a window size of 32 KiB.

excerpt.es: The maximum window size, expressed as a power of 2. For example, if MAX_WBITS is 15 it results in a window size of 32 KiB.
